name: kazparts-rebuild
description: Clean rebuild of the KazParts auto-parts ecommerce and admin platform.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @kazparts/config && npm run build -w @kazparts/db
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @kazparts/api && npm run build -w @kazparts/web && npm run build -w @kazparts/worker
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run start:dev -w @kazparts/api
